title: lasthenia glaberrima
intro: Lasthenia glaberrima, also known as yellowhead or Mission goldenrays, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The leaves and flowers of the Lasthenia glaberrima plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
